text.title: e2e-testing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for e2e-testing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Fixed sleep causes flakiness across different CI machine speeds
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Replace with: await expect(page.getByText('Success')).toBeVisible() — Playwright waits automatically.
